title: Emergency and safety basics
objective: Comunicar necesidades urgentes y datos básicos de seguridad sin entrar en vocabulario técnico avanzado.

activities.feedback_correct: Es una petición clara de ayuda médica urgente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una petición con call y ambulance.

activities.prompt: My name is Ana and I am at the ___ station.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la palabra que forma police station.

activities.prompt: You need to give your location.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la pregunta sobre el lugar donde estás.

activities.instruction: Une la frase con su función.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la frase pide ayuda, informa o indica una acción.

activities.feedback_correct: Es un mensaje corto y claro.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con I need y termina con help, please.

activities.prompt: Hello, I need help. My friend is hurt. We are at the train station, near the main entrance.
activities.question: Where are they?
activities.feedback_correct: La ubicación aparece al final del mensaje.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la frase con We are at.

activities.prompt: I need help, please. My friend is hurt. We are at the train station near the main entrance.
activities.feedback_correct: El mensaje comunica la necesidad y la ubicación claramente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Habla con calma, separa los datos y enfatiza el lugar.

activities.prompt: Call the front desk if you need help. Say your name, room number, and location. Speak slowly and give one fact at a time.
activities.question: What information should you give?
options: Your name, room number, and location.
activities.correct_answer: Your name, room number, and location.
activities.feedback_correct: El mensaje enumera esos tres datos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la lista después de Say.

activities.prompt: Write three short safety messages: one asking for a doctor, one giving your location, and one explaining a simple problem.

activities.instruction: Comunica una situación urgente con la IA.
activities.prompt: The AI is an emergency information worker. Give your name, location, simple problem, and immediate need. Answer short follow-up questions calmly.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes comunicar información básica de seguridad de forma clara.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA mantiene el lenguaje simple y practica un dato cada vez.
